title: gentiana autumnalis subsp. pennelliana
intro: Gentiana autumnalis subsp. pennelliana is a subspecies of the Gentian family, specifically a type of flowering plant native to the United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as an antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Gentiana autumnalis subsp. pennelliana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
